subject: A quick website concept for Bella's Hair Studio
body:
Hi Bella,

I've been following your Instagram and really enjoy the work coming out of Bella's Hair Studio in Cornwall. The cuts, the color, the personality of the shop, it all comes through online.

I put together a quick one-page website preview as a concept, just to show how a simple site could help turn that online traffic into bookings. Nothing polished, just a starting point.

Want to see it?
